task_completion.description: Verify that the taxpayer's personal and spousal information has been entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax Personal Information screen or wizard showing 'Callum James MacNeil', SIN '046 294 182', address in Lunenburg, NS, and spouse 'Fiona Margaret MacNeil' with Net Income '$28,200'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the T4 slip from Lunenburg Sea Products Ltd. has been entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax T4 entry screen showing Box 14 as $14,400, Box 16 as $720, Box 18 as $288, and Box 22 as $1,440.

task_completion.description: Verify that the T2121 Statement of Fishing Activities has been filled out with the correct gross revenue and expenses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T2121 form in StudioTax showing Gross Revenue of $128,400 and corresponding expenses such as Fuel ($18,200), Crew share ($31,400), Bait and ice ($8,750), etc.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Capital Cost Allowance (CCA) for the vessel and equipment has been entered on the T2121.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the CCA section of the T2121 form showing Class 7 with a starting UCC of $85,000 and Class 8 with a starting UCC of $14,500.

task_completion.description: Verify that the RRSP contribution and charitable donation have been entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the RRSP entry screen showing a $6,000 contribution (Jan-Mar 2024) and the Donations screen showing $300 to Lunenburg Heritage Society.

task_completion.description: Verify that the tax return has been saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog box showing the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' and filename 'callum_macneil.24t', or the StudioTax title bar displaying 'callum_macneil.24t' after saving.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the standard StudioTax 2024 application windows, menus, and forms being actively used.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a text editor to manually create or modify the .24t file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no instances of Notepad, VS Code, or other text editors open with raw XML/text data representing the tax return.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass manual data entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no Command Prompt, PowerShell, or terminal windows executing scripts to generate the output file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The taxpayer is Callum MacNeil residing in Nova Scotia (NS). The task requires completing a T2121 Statement of Fishing Activities. The expected output file must be saved exactly at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\callum_macneil.24t.
